rule_name: Defense Evasion - Disabling Windows Defender via PowerShell
search_query: index=windows process_name="powershell.exe" command_line="*Set-MpPreference*" command_line="*-DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true*" | table _time, Computer, User, process_name, command_line | rename command_line as "Evasion_Command"
description: Detects attempts to disable Windows Defender real-time monitoring using PowerShell. This is a common defense evasion technique used by attackers to execute malicious code without being blocked by antivirus.
